economic_notes: Dakota Nation has investments in Wahpeton Dakota Developments LP (99.9%) and Wahpeton Dakota Developments Ltd. (100%) for managing investments and rental properties. Also operates Tatanka Store (retail). Member of Prince Albert Grand Council and QBOW Child and Family Services Inc. COVID-19 had significant operational impact. Construction in progress of $988,690.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 but audit report is dated January 9, 2024 — extremely late filing, Nation acknowledged being in breach of reporting deadline. Two GBEs accounted for using modified equity method: Wahpeton Dakota Developments LP and Wahpeton Dakota Developments Ltd. Three consolidated entities: General, Enterprises (Tatanka Store), and Housing Program. COVID-19 segment reported separately with $519,950 in expenses. Unrestricted operating deficit of -$666,886. Net financial assets per statement of changes is $855,715 (actual year end). 19 housing units disclosed at nominal value as fully amortized. Schedule 1 tangible capital assets net book value calculated from available data.
